name: sep-sistema-v3
description: SEP — Serviço Escola de Psicologia | Estácio Aracaju

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.db:schema: docker cp database/schema.sql mysql-local:/schema.sql && docker exec -i mysql-local sh -c "mysql -u root -proot123 < /schema.sql"
scripts.db:seed: docker cp database/seeds.sql mysql-local:/seeds.sql && docker exec -i mysql-local sh -c "mysql -u root -proot123 < /seeds.sql"
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:schema && npm run migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:reset: docker exec mysql-local mysql -u root -proot123 -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS sep_db" && npm run db:setup
